inputSchema.description:
JSON configuration for the feeder simulator.

Special cases S3 sources right now.
inputSchema.title: FeederConfig

ControlType.description: Enum for different types of DER control modes.
ControlType.title: ControlType

name: ORNL DOPF (PSO)
description: Distribution OPF via Particle Swarm Optimization

static_inputs.description: List of PV system bus IDs
PV capacity in kW per system

name: ORNL DSSE (GN-WLS)
description: Distribution state estimation via Gauss-Newton WLS

static_inputs.description: List of bus IDs for EVCS locations
Mapping of bus IDs to EV indices
Number of EVs per charging station

dynamic_inputs.description: Real voltages from feeder for voltage estimation
Imaginary voltages from feeder for voltage estimation

dynamic_outputs.description: OpenDSS load commands for EV charging power injection

name.description: Unique identifier for the federate name
name.title: Name

deltat.description: Co-simulation time step interval in seconds
deltat.title: Time Step (s)

max_itr.description: Maximum number of ADMM iterations per step
max_itr.title: Max Itr

switches.description: List of switches/controllable lines in the area
switches.title: Switches

relaxed.description: Boolean flag to enable relaxed model formulation
relaxed.title: Relaxed

rho_sup.description: ADMM penalty parameter for active power injection
rho_sup.title: Rho Sup

rho_vup.description: ADMM penalty parameter for upstream voltage
rho_vup.title: Rho Vup

rho_sdn.description: ADMM penalty parameter for active/reactive power flow discrepancy
rho_sdn.title: Rho Sdn

rho_vdn.description: ADMM penalty parameter for downstream voltage discrepancy
rho_vdn.title: Rho Vdn

vup_tol.description: Convergence tolerance for upstream voltage mismatch
vup_tol.title: Vup Tol

number_of_timesteps.description: Total number of simulation timesteps. When > 0, the federate exits after this many steps.
number_of_timesteps.title: Number of Timesteps

AlgorithmParameters.description: Parameters for the state estimation algorithm.
AlgorithmParameters.title: AlgorithmParameters
